name: AG MORTG.INV.TRUST DL-,01
summary: AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that focuses on investing in, acquiring, and managing a portfolio of residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), other mortgage-related assets, and commercial real estate assets. The company aims to provide attractive risk-adjusted returns to its investors through a combination of current income and capital appreciation; its headquarters are located in Bethesda, Maryland. It operates primarily in the United States, acquiring assets through various channels and managing its portfolio to optimize returns.
